heading: Telephone installation and charges
label: 949 Telephone installation and charges
text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, amounts appropriated to the Department of Homeland Security are available to install, repair, and maintain telephone wiring in residences owned or leased by the United States Government and, if necessary for national defense purposes in other private residences.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–282section 669 of this title2002— substituted “of Homeland Security” for “of Transportation”.Pub. L. 107–296

Effective Date of 2002 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the date of transfer of the Coast Guard to the Department of Homeland Security, see , set out as a note under , Armed Forces.Pub. L. 107–296section 1704(g) of Pub. L. 107–296section 101 of Title 10
